summary: Tested Contract Guard ('Before I Sign' mode) and Risk Monitor (MOCKED email surveillance) features. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed - mode toggle works correctly, Settings Risk Monitor tab functional, Dashboard widget displays alerts.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/risk-monitor/status returns correct structure (connected, provider, emails_scanned, threats_detected, alerts)
Backend: POST /api/risk-monitor/connect with provider='gmail' returns success with mock alerts
Backend: POST /api/risk-monitor/connect with provider='outlook' returns success
Backend: POST /api/risk-monitor/connect with invalid provider returns 400
Backend: GET /api/risk-monitor/status after connect shows connected=true, emails_scanned=147, threats_detected=3
Backend: PUT /api/risk-monitor/alerts/{id}/dismiss returns status='dismissed'
Backend: POST /api/risk-monitor/disconnect returns status='disconnected'
Backend: GET /api/risk-monitor/status after disconnect shows connected=false
Backend: GET /api/contract-guard/reviews returns list of reviews
Backend: GET /api/health returns 200
Backend: GET /api/ returns API info
Frontend: Upload page mode toggle visible with 'Analyze risk' and 'Before I sign' buttons
Frontend: Standard mode shows blue upload zone, Document Scanner section, Case selector
Frontend: Contract Guard mode shows amber upload zone, 'Drop your contract here' text, negotiation goals placeholder
Frontend: Contract Guard mode correctly hides Document Scanner and Case selector
Frontend: Switching modes toggles visibility of sections correctly
Frontend: Settings page has Risk Monitor tab with shield icon
Frontend: Risk Monitor tab shows Gmail/Outlook connect buttons when not connected
Frontend: Risk Monitor tab shows 'Demo mode' notice about simulated connection
Frontend: After Gmail connect, shows success message, stats (147 emails, 3 threats), Disconnect button
Frontend: Detected threats section shows alert cards with severity badges (HIGH, MEDIUM)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Risk Monitor widget when email is connected
Frontend: Dashboard widget shows monitoring email, emails scanned count, alert cards
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_contract_guard_risk_monitor.py (New test file for Contract Guard and Risk Monitor features)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract Guard and Risk Monitor features fully implemented and tested. Contract Guard: Upload page has mode toggle between 'Analyze risk' (standard) and 'Before I sign' (Contract Guard). Contract Guard mode uses amber UI theme, hides Document Scanner and Case selector, shows negotiation-focused placeholder text. Risk Monitor: MOCKED email surveillance - connecting Gmail/Outlook creates simulated mock alerts (3 pre-defined: 'Notice of Intent to Sue', 'Lease Renewal', 'Policy Renewal'). Settings page has Risk Monitor tab (key='monitor') with connect/disconnect/alerts UI. Dashboard shows Risk Monitor widget when email is connected. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_contract_guard_risk_monitor.py can be reused for regression testing.
